landing.hero.heading: One platform for every tool your team subscribes to.
landing.hero.subheading: Allocore Suite unites central auth, team management, module gating, billing, and analytics into a single, consistent shell.
landing.features.heading: Built for multi-tool SaaS teams
landing.features.subheading: Everything you need to onboard customers, manage access, and ship connected products from one admin panel.
landing.features.auth.title: Central auth
landing.features.auth.desc: Single sign-on across all modules with role-based access.
landing.features.teams.title: Team workspaces
landing.features.teams.desc: Create teams, invite members, and switch context instantly.
landing.features.billing.title: Billing & plans
landing.features.billing.desc: Stripe, PayPal, and bank-transfer subscriptions with plan gating.
landing.features.analytics.title: Analytics dashboard
landing.features.analytics.desc: Combined insights from every subscribed module in one place.
landing.modules.heading: Connected modules
landing.modules.subheading: Unlock the tools your team needs. Each module shares the same auth, team, and billing layer.
landing.modules.empty: New modules are added as your product suite grows.
landing.cta.heading: Start using Allocore Suite today
landing.cta.subheading: Create an account, invite your team, and subscribe to the modules that power your business.
landing.meta.description: Allocore Suite unites central auth, team management, module gating, billing, and analytics into a single, consistent shell.
landing.meta.keywords: SaaS, team management, billing, modules, authentication
auth.guest.heading: One workspace for every tool your team uses.
auth.guest.subheading: Central authentication, team management, billing, and module gating in a single consistent shell.
auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to access your dashboard, modules, and admin tools.
